requirement_topic.en: Market Access — SABER Platform: Product Certificate of Conformity (PCoC) and Shipment Certificate of Conformity (SCoC)
requirement_topic.zh: 市场准入——SABER平台：产品合格证书（PCoC）与货运合格证书（SCoC）
requirement_topic.zht: 市場准入——SABER平台：產品合格證書（PCoC）與貨運合格證書（SCoC）

summary.en: Saudi Arabia operates the SABER (Saudi Product Safety Programme) conformity assessment platform, administered by SASO. All regulated products — including electrical and electronic equipment such as EV charging equipment — must obtain both a Product Certificate of Conformity (PCoC) and a Shipment Certificate of Conformity (SCoC) before being imported into, or placed on, the Saudi market. The PCoC is product-specific and is issued by a SASO-approved conformity assessment body (CAB) after testing and factory/quality assessment; it is registered on the SABER platform and links to the product model. The SCoC is shipment-specific and is issued for each consignment, attesting that the shipped goods correspond to the certified product. Without both a valid PCoC and SCoC, Saudi Customs will not clear the goods. PCoC is linked to the Saudi importer's or distributor's account on the SABER platform. Third-party exporters must coordinate with a Saudi importer registered on SABER to initiate the PCoC application.
summary.zh: 沙特阿拉伯通过SASO管理的SABER（沙特产品安全计划）合格评定平台运营。所有受监管产品——包括电动汽车充电设备等电气和电子设备——在进口至沙特市场或在沙特市场销售前，须同时取得产品合格证书（PCoC）和货运合格证书（SCoC）。PCoC针对特定产品型号，由SASO认可的合格评定机构（CAB）在完成测试及工厂/质量评定后颁发；PCoC在SABER平台注册，并与产品型号关联。SCoC针对特定货运批次颁发，证明所发货物与已认证产品相符。若不同时持有有效的PCoC和SCoC，沙特海关将不予放行货物。PCoC与沙特进口商或经销商在SABER平台的账户绑定。第三方出口商须与在SABER注册的沙特进口商协调，方可发起PCoC申请。
summary.zht: 沙特阿拉伯通過SASO管理的SABER（沙特產品安全計劃）合格評定平台運營。所有受監管產品——包括電動汽車充電設備等電氣和電子設備——在進口至沙特市場或在沙特市場銷售前，須同時取得產品合格證書（PCoC）和貨運合格證書（SCoC）。PCoC針對特定產品型號，由SASO認可的合格評定機構（CAB）在完成測試及工廠/質量評定後頒發；PCoC在SABER平台注冊，並與產品型號關聯。SCoC針對特定貨運批次頒發，證明所發貨物與已認證產品相符。若不同時持有有效的PCoC和SCoC，沙特海關將不予放行貨物。PCoC與沙特進口商或經銷商在SABER平台的賬戶綁定。第三方出口商須與在SABER注冊的沙特進口商協調，方可發起PCoC申請。

standards_or_laws: SABER platform (saber.sa) — mandatory conformity assessment platform for regulated products entering Saudi Arabia
SASO Technical Regulations — mandatory product safety requirements enforced via SABER
Saudi Customs clearance requirements — PCoC and SCoC required for customs release of regulated products

summary.en: China's market access system for EV charging equipment is CCC (China Compulsory Certification), administered by CNCA/SAMR. CCC involves product testing by a designated Chinese CAB, factory inspection, and issuance of a CCC certificate. The structural differences from SABER are: (1) CCC is a single domestic certificate — SABER requires both PCoC (product-level) and SCoC (per-shipment); (2) CCC certificates are issued to and held by the Chinese manufacturer — SABER PCoC is linked to the Saudi importer's account; (3) CCC does not require per-shipment documentation — SABER SCoC is required for every individual import consignment; (4) Chinese CNAS-accredited CABs are not SASO-approved CABs unless separately accredited. There is no bilateral recognition agreement between CNCA and SASO that would allow CCC certification to satisfy SABER requirements.
summary.zh: 中国电动汽车充电设备的市场准入体系为CCC（中国强制认证），由CNCA/SAMR管理。CCC涉及中国指定CAB的产品检测、工厂检查及CCC证书颁发。与SABER的结构性差异包括：（1）CCC为单一国内证书——SABER要求同时持有PCoC（产品层面）和SCoC（每批次）；（2）CCC证书颁发给中国制造商并由其持有——SABER PCoC与沙特进口商账户绑定；（3）CCC无需每批次文件——SABER SCoC须在每次进口货运时提供；（4）中国CNAS认可CAB不是SASO认可CAB，除非另行获得认可。CNCA与SASO之间不存在可使CCC认证满足SABER要求的双边互认协议。
summary.zht: 中國電動汽車充電設備的市場准入體系為CCC（中國強制認證），由CNCA/SAMR管理。CCC涉及中國指定CAB的產品檢測、工廠檢查及CCC證書頒發。與SABER的結構性差異包括：（1）CCC為單一國內證書——SABER要求同時持有PCoC（產品層面）和SCoC（每批次）；（2）CCC證書頒發給中國製造商並由其持有——SABER PCoC與沙特進口商賬戶綁定；（3）CCC無需每批次文件——SABER SCoC須在每次進口貨運時提供；（4）中國CNAS認可CAB不是SASO認可CAB，除非另行獲得認可。CNCA與SASO之間不存在可使CCC認證滿足SABER要求的雙邊互認協議。

standards_or_laws: CNCA-C25-01:2024 — CCC implementation rules for EV charging equipment (mandatory CCC from 1 March 2025)
Measures for the Administration of Compulsory Product Certification (SAMR 2020)
CCC — China Compulsory Certification system administered by CNCA

gap.en: SABER is a fundamentally different market access architecture from CCC. Key gaps for Chinese exporters: (1) No mutual recognition — CCC certification cannot be accepted on SABER; fresh testing and evaluation by a SASO-approved CAB is required; (2) Saudi importer dependency — the PCoC application on SABER must be initiated by or coordinated with a registered Saudi importer or distributor; Chinese manufacturers without a Saudi partner cannot complete SABER registration independently; (3) Per-shipment SCoC — every shipment to Saudi Arabia requires a separate SCoC issued by a SASO-approved CAB, creating a recurring per-shipment compliance cost not present under CCC; (4) Arabic labelling and documentation — product labels, safety warnings, installation manuals, and technical specifications are expected in Arabic for Saudi market compliance, which is not required for CCC; (5) Model-specific registration — each product model variant must be separately registered on SABER; bundle or family certification practices used in CCC do not directly translate to SABER.
gap.zh: SABER与CCC在市场准入架构上存在根本性差异。中国出口商面临的主要差距：（1）无互认机制——CCC认证不能在SABER上被接受；须由SASO认可的CAB重新进行测试和评定；（2）对沙特进口商的依赖——SABER上的PCoC申请须由已注册的沙特进口商或经销商发起或协调；没有沙特合作伙伴的中国制造商无法独立完成SABER注册；（3）每批次SCoC——对沙特的每批次货运须由SASO认可的CAB颁发单独的SCoC，产生CCC体系下不存在的每批次周期性合规费用；（4）阿拉伯语标签及文件——产品标签、安全警告、安装手册及技术规格在沙特市场合规时预期提供阿拉伯语版本，而CCC不作此要求；（5）型号专项注册——每个产品型号变体须在SABER上单独注册；CCC使用的产品系列认证做法无法直接应用于SABER。
gap.zht: SABER與CCC在市場准入架構上存在根本性差異。中國出口商面臨的主要差距：（1）無互認機制——CCC認證不能在SABER上被接受；須由SASO認可的CAB重新進行測試和評定；（2）對沙特進口商的依賴——SABER上的PCoC申請須由已注冊的沙特進口商或經銷商發起或協調；沒有沙特合作夥伴的中國製造商無法獨立完成SABER注冊；（3）每批次SCoC——對沙特的每批次貨運須由SASO認可的CAB頒發單獨的SCoC，產生CCC體系下不存在的每批次週期性合規費用；（4）阿拉伯語標籤及文件——產品標籤、安全警告、安裝手冊及技術規格在沙特市場合規時預期提供阿拉伯語版本，而CCC不作此要求；（5）型號專項注冊——每個產品型號變體須在SABER上單獨注冊；CCC使用的產品系列認證做法無法直接應用於SABER。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — PCoC and SCoC via SABER are required for all regulated products entering Saudi Arabia; products without SABER clearance are refused by Saudi Customs
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — CCC required for EV charging equipment sold in China from 1 March 2025 under CNCA-C25-01:2024

source.publisher: SASO — Saudi Standards, Metrology and Quality Organization (SABER platform)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] SABER PCoC + SCoC is the mandatory Saudi market access gate for EV charging equipment. CCC certification is not accepted. Chinese exporters must engage a SASO-approved conformity assessment body, coordinate with a registered Saudi importer for SABER platform access, obtain product-level PCoC before first shipment, and obtain a separate SCoC for every subsequent shipment. Arabic labelling and documentation are expected. Exporters should visit saber.sa to identify the current applicable SASO technical regulation and approved CAB list for EV charging equipment before initiating a compliance programme.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] SABER PCoC + SCoC是电动汽车充电设备进入沙特市场的强制性门槛。CCC认证不被接受。中国出口商须聘请SASO认可的合格评定机构，与在SABER平台注册的沙特进口商协调以获得平台访问权限，在首批发货前取得产品级PCoC，并为此后每批货运单独取得SCoC。阿拉伯语标签及文件为预期要求。出口商在启动合规计划前，应访问saber.sa以确认适用于电动汽车充电设备的当前SASO技术法规及认可CAB名单。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] SABER PCoC + SCoC是電動汽車充電設備進入沙特市場的強制性門檻。CCC認證不被接受。中國出口商須聘請SASO認可的合格評定機構，與在SABER平台注冊的沙特進口商協調以獲得平台訪問權限，在首批發貨前取得產品級PCoC，並為此後每批貨運單獨取得SCoC。阿拉伯語標籤及文件為預期要求。出口商在啟動合規計劃前，應訪問saber.sa以確認適用於電動汽車充電設備的當前SASO技術法規及認可CAB名單。

requirement_topic.en: Saudi Importer Registration, Arabic Labelling, and Product Documentation Requirements
requirement_topic.zh: 沙特进口商注册、阿拉伯语标签及产品文件要求
requirement_topic.zht: 沙特進口商注冊、阿拉伯語標籤及產品文件要求

summary.en: Beyond the SABER PCoC/SCoC certification, products placed on the Saudi market must comply with SASO labelling and documentation requirements: (1) Arabic language: product labels, safety markings, installation instructions, and user manuals must be in Arabic (or bilingual Arabic/English); this is enforced by Saudi Customs and SASO market surveillance; (2) Importer identity: the Saudi importer's name and commercial registration number must appear on the product label or accompanying documentation; (3) Country of origin labelling: required on the product and packaging per Saudi import regulations; (4) Conformity mark: the SASO conformity mark (or reference to the SABER PCoC number) is required for regulated products; (5) Technical documentation must be retained and made available to SASO market surveillance authorities on request, for a period specified in the applicable SASO technical regulation.
summary.zh: 除SABER PCoC/SCoC认证外，在沙特市场销售的产品须符合SASO标签和文件要求：（1）阿拉伯语：产品标签、安全标识、安装说明及用户手册须以阿拉伯语（或阿拉伯语/英语双语）提供；由沙特海关及SASO市场监督执行；（2）进口商信息：沙特进口商名称及商业注册编号须出现在产品标签或随附文件上；（3）原产地标签：根据沙特进口法规，须在产品及包装上标注；（4）合格标志：受监管产品须标注SASO合格标志（或注明SABER PCoC编号）；（5）技术文件须按适用的SASO技术法规规定的期限保存，并在SASO市场监督机构要求时提供。
summary.zht: 除SABER PCoC/SCoC認證外，在沙特市場銷售的產品須符合SASO標籤和文件要求：（1）阿拉伯語：產品標籤、安全標識、安裝說明及用戶手冊須以阿拉伯語（或阿拉伯語/英語雙語）提供；由沙特海關及SASO市場監督執行；（2）進口商資訊：沙特進口商名稱及商業注冊編號須出現在產品標籤或隨附文件上；（3）原產地標籤：根據沙特進口法規，須在產品及包裝上標注；（4）合格標誌：受監管產品須標注SASO合格標誌（或注明SABER PCoC編號）；（5）技術文件須按適用的SASO技術法規規定的期限保存，並在SASO市場監督機構要求時提供。

standards_or_laws: SASO labelling requirements for regulated products (verify current requirements on saso.gov.sa)
Saudi Customs import regulations — country of origin and importer labelling
SABER platform — importer account registration and PCoC linkage requirements

summary.en: Chinese product labelling for domestic market requires Chinese-language labels (GB/T 191 packaging symbols; GB 10396 safety labels for machinery). Export products are not legally required to carry Arabic labels under Chinese domestic law — Arabic labelling is a destination-country requirement that Chinese manufacturers must add before or during export. CCC certificates are issued to and held by the Chinese manufacturer; there is no Saudi-importer linkage requirement under CCC.
summary.zh: 中国国内市场产品标签要求中文标签（GB/T 191包装符号；GB 10396机械安全标签）。依据中国国内法律，出口产品无需强制加贴阿拉伯语标签——阿拉伯语标签是目的地国要求，中国制造商须在出口前或出口过程中自行添加。CCC证书颁发给中国制造商并由其持有；CCC体系下不存在沙特进口商绑定要求。
summary.zht: 中國國內市場產品標籤要求中文標籤（GB/T 191包裝符號；GB 10396機械安全標籤）。依據中國國內法律，出口產品無需強制加貼阿拉伯語標籤——阿拉伯語標籤是目的地國要求，中國製造商須在出口前或出口過程中自行添加。CCC證書頒發給中國製造商並由其持有；CCC體系下不存在沙特進口商綁定要求。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 191 — Packaging — Pictorial marking for handling of goods (Chinese domestic standard)
CCC — China Compulsory Certification (no Saudi-importer linkage requirement)

gap.en: Chinese manufacturers exporting EV chargers to Saudi Arabia face documentation and labelling gaps with no Chinese domestic regulatory analogue: (1) Arabic labels and manuals must be produced from scratch — typical Chinese product documentation is in Chinese and English only; (2) Saudi importer name and registration number must appear on labels — Chinese manufacturers must have a Saudi distribution partner established before first shipment; (3) SASO conformity mark must be applied — this requires PCoC completion before label printing; (4) Per-shipment SCoC coordination — the Saudi importer or a freight forwarder familiar with SABER must manage SCoC issuance for each consignment; (5) Technical documentation in Arabic or English accessible to SASO market surveillance — Chinese-only documentation is not sufficient.
gap.zh: 中国制造商出口电动汽车充电器至沙特阿拉伯，面临在中国国内法规体系中没有对应规定的文件和标签差距：（1）阿拉伯语标签及手册须从头制作——典型的中国产品文件仅提供中文和英文版本；（2）沙特进口商名称及注册编号须出现在标签上——中国制造商首批发货前须确立沙特分销合作伙伴；（3）须加贴SASO合格标志——这要求在标签印制前完成PCoC；（4）每批次SCoC协调——沙特进口商或熟悉SABER的货运代理须负责为每批货运办理SCoC；（5）供SASO市场监督查阅的阿拉伯语或英语技术文件——仅有中文文件不够。
gap.zht: 中國製造商出口電動汽車充電器至沙特阿拉伯，面臨在中國國內法規體系中沒有對應規定的文件和標籤差距：（1）阿拉伯語標籤及手冊須從頭製作——典型的中國產品文件僅提供中文和英文版本；（2）沙特進口商名稱及注冊編號須出現在標籤上——中國製造商首批發貨前須確立沙特分銷合作夥伴；（3）須加貼SASO合格標誌——這要求在標籤印製前完成PCoC；（4）每批次SCoC協調——沙特進口商或熟悉SABER的貨運代理須負責為每批貨運辦理SCoC；（5）供SASO市場監督查閱的阿拉伯語或英語技術文件——僅有中文文件不夠。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — Arabic labelling, SASO conformity mark, Saudi importer identification, and technical documentation are required by SASO for regulated products on the Saudi market
mandatory_status.cn: N/A for export — Chinese domestic labelling laws do not require Arabic; no Saudi-importer linkage under CCC

source.publisher: SASO — Saudi Standards, Metrology and Quality Organization

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Arabic product labels, Saudi importer identification, SASO conformity mark, and Arabic/English technical documentation are mandatory for EV charging equipment on the Saudi market. These requirements have no equivalent in Chinese domestic CCC compliance and must be built from scratch. A Saudi distribution partner is a practical prerequisite for SABER platform access and PCoC application initiation.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 阿拉伯语产品标签、沙特进口商标识、SASO合格标志及阿拉伯语/英语技术文件，对于沙特市场的电动汽车充电设备为强制要求。上述要求在中国国内CCC合规体系中没有等同规定，须从头构建。沙特分销合作伙伴是访问SABER平台并发起PCoC申请的实际前提条件。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 阿拉伯語產品標籤、沙特進口商標識、SASO合格標誌及阿拉伯語/英語技術文件，對於沙特市場的電動汽車充電設備為強制要求。上述要求在中國國內CCC合規體系中沒有等同規定，須從頭構建。沙特分銷合作夥伴是訪問SABER平台並發起PCoC申請的實際前提條件。
